name: HWR_WLNS_GBL_SCORE
description: This table stores the wellness global score for each user per topic.

columns.Name: ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary key for this table.

columns.Name: FUS_PROFILE_ID
columns.Comments: This is the fusion profile ID of the employee.

columns.Name: RAW_SCORE
columns.Comments: Raw score of the specific wellness topic across all sources.

columns.Name: PERCENTILE
columns.Comments: Percentile rank of the user score compared with others.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Indicates the status of score calculation. 2 score calculated, 1 obsolete record.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
